title: Define StateDefinition record + StateDisplay + StateDomain + StateValueType with Codecs

reference_files.reason: State storage model - value types table, registration fields (domain/value_type/default_value/display), display sub-fields (name/color/format/priority/hide_default)
Tooltip system - state display fields definition (name/color/format/priority/hide_default)

acceptance_criteria: StateDomain enum defined with values GUN, PLAYER, BULLET and corresponding Codec
StateValueType enum defined with values INT, LONG, DOUBLE, FLOAT, BOOLEAN, STRING, UUID and corresponding Codec

StateDisplay record defined with fields: name (String), color (String, hex like #FFAA00), format (String, contains {value} placeholder), priority (int, default 0), hideDefault (boolean, default false) and Codec
StateDefinition record defined with fields: domain (StateDomain), valueType (StateValueType), defaultValue (Object, type matches valueType), display (StateDisplay) and Codec
StateDefinition Codec supports network sync (compact Codec for client-side registry sync)
All records are immutable (all fields final)
